name: Dill Cream Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Season well with salt and pepper.
3. Adjust flavor by adding more mustard, lemon juice, or milk/cream for desired consistency.
4. Chill the dressing for at least one hour before serving.
